build_provenance.source_of_truth: bin_commit, parsed from the binary's own --version output. repo_head_commit is the llama.cpp checkout's HEAD at record time and may legitimately differ if the tree moved on after this binary was built; it is recorded so any mismatch is visible, not hidden.

llama_cpp.config: -n 16 --temp 0 --seed 42 -t 8 -tb 8 -b 2048 -ub 1024, custom vicuna_v1 jinja (prompt parity with the Phase 1 HF baseline), extra_args=[]

dataset: same pinned 200-sample lmms-lab/textvqa slice as textvqa_llamacpp.py (assets/phase1/textvqa200_manifest.jsonl)
metric: soft VQA accuracy, identical scoring code (textvqa_sim.vqa_accuracy)
